commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a persisted latest-attempt handoff-pending marker and uses it in both subagent completion announce retry guards so transient parent-busy completions retry until the existing hard expiry instead of giving up at the normal retry cap.

PR surface: Source +29, Tests +125. Total +154 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: yes. The linked reporter log plus current source show `completion_handoff_pending` can be returned while both cleanup and resume guards still apply the retry cap; I did not run a live multi-subagent gateway reproduction.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] No narrow automation repair remains; maintainer review should decide whether to accept the bounded retry semantics and land once checks are satisfactory.
